description: Tech-corporate electronic bed. Confident, modern, not cheesy. Default Short track.
Inspiring futuristic-corporate instrumental — sleek synths, a steady driving rhythm, and expressive electric-guitar melodies. Motivational and uplifting; good for Shorts and promos.
High-energy motivational corporate electro-pop — punchy drums, driving bassline, bright piano, bold uplifting lead synth. Confident and dynamic; brand videos / product launches / Shorts.
Inspirational corporate instrumental at 125 BPM — bright kalimbas and gamelans, evolving synth lead with filter sweeps, punchy driving beat, uplifting strings. Bright/warm option for Shorts.
